title: Social Work Associate (Family Service)
description:
About the Role


The Social Work Associate is a support role in the field of social work. He / She assist to implement programme and perform community development activities and outreach. He / She also assumes a secondary role in case management through providing support to caseworkers.


Why Join Us?


Be part of a passionate team dedicated to strengthening families and building resilient communities. In this role, you’ll make a real impact by promoting social cohesion, supporting individuals through life challenges, and driving initiatives that address key social issues. Join us in creating meaningful change—one family, one community at a time.


Key Responsibilities:


· Provide Information & Referral (I&R) services in line with FSC guidelines and standards.

· Conduct intake assessments for new clients according to FSC service standards.

· Handle mainline calls, walk-in enquiries, and front desk duties when required.

· Organize and participate in community outreach initiatives.

· Assist in assessing community needs and liaise with external stakeholders for publicity and networking.

· Support development and implementation of community initiatives from MSF or within the agency.

· Assist in planning and preparation of community group work.

· Assist in programme development and execution, including logistical and administrative support.

· Support volunteer management in collaboration with the agency’s volunteer manager.

· Manage and monitor low/no-risk cases and ensure compliance with case work processes and timelines.

· Compile quarterly statistics, track case work KPIs, and prepare data for MSF tracking requirements.

· Provide administrative support for practice observations and centre operations.

· Undertake other duties as assigned by supervisor or HOD.


Requirements


· Minimum Diploma in Social Work

· Minimum 2 years of relevant experience

· Conversant in English and any 2nd language

· Good communication and interpersonal skills

· A good team player, dynamic and self-motivated

· Keen on administration details and detail oriented

· Has a strong passion in reaching out and making a difference in the lives of the needy

postedCompany.description:
REACH Community Services Ltd. is a charitable organisation established in 1999 which seeks to inspire hope and empower positive change in vulnerable families, couples, youths and lonely seniors through our 10 community touchpoints: Family Service Centre @ Bishan, Family Service Centre @ Sin Ming, Youth Powerhouse @ Bukit Batok, Counselling Centre @ Shunfu, Senior Centre @Jalan Membina, Senior Centre @ Bukit Batok, Senior Centre @ Bukit Gombak Vista, Active Ageing Centre (Care) @ Teck Whye Vista and Senior Care Centre @ Senja Valley.


• Good career development opportunities

• Great learning opportunities

• Warm and friendly environment
postedCompany.name: REACH COMMUNITY SERVICES LTD.
